text: Jab unhone kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gaya hoon, toh mera dimaag sunn ho gaya aur bas rona nikal pada, ab school rejection ki baat kaise karun? Mere andar bas ek hulchul si machi hai aur lag raha hai jaise sab khatam ho gaya, mujhe samajh hi nahi aa raha ki main kya bolun ya kya sochun. Bas unki woh baat kaante ki tarah chubhi ja rahi hai aur main bas siskiyan liye ja raha hoon.

Partner ki baat sunkar mere hosh udd gaye aur main bas office ki file ko takta reh gaya, abhi toh bache ki bimari ka bojh hi nahi sambhal raha tha. Hospital ka kharcha aur 'log kya kahenge' wale darr ke beech unki ye baat sunkar mera dum ghutne laga hai. Abhi mujhse koi business solution mat pucho, mera dil itna bhara hua hai ki bas cheekh kar rone ka mann kar raha hai.

Unke 'badal gaye ho' bolte hi main bilakh utha aur purani sari baatein dimaag mein bheed lagakar aa gayi. Bacha bimar hai, koi school lene ko taiyaar nahi aur upar se parivaar ka ye blame—mujhe toh lag raha hai main pagal ho jaunga. Abhi main dukan ka nuksaan ya bache ka treatment nahi soch sakta, bas ye rona ruk hi nahi raha.

Jab unhone shehar ki hawa lagne ki baat ki, toh mera dil baith gaya aur main bas kursi par dher ho gaya. Ghar mein waise hi sab mujhe bache ki disability ke liye blame karte hain aur kehte hain ki mera 'kuch nahi hone dunga' wala vaada jhootha tha. Main abhi kuch nahi kar sakta, mera poora sharir thanda pad gaya hai aur bas ek ajeeb si ghabrahat ho rahi hai.

Unki baat sunkar meri toh aatma kaanp gayi, jaise kisi ne mere khali-pan ka mazaak udaya ho. Main career aur health neglect karke din bhar therapy ke chakkar aur parivaar ki baatein sunkar thak chuka hoon, par ab rone ke alawa kuch sujh nahi raha. Abhi mujhse mat pucho aage kya hoga, mera dimaag itna bhara hai ki main bas rona chahta hoon.
